name: monitor-executions
description: Search and inspect agent executions by status and time
query: Show me all failed agent executions from today and help me understand what went wrong.
expected_behavior: Search failed executions: agentspan agent execution --status FAILED --since 1d
For each failure, get detailed status: agentspan agent status <id>
Identify root causes (missing credentials, timeouts, tool errors)
Present diagnostic table with agent name, failed task, root cause, and fix
Offer to help fix the issues
success_criteria: Uses agentspan agent execution with --status and --since flags
Inspects individual executions for root cause
